title: Alex's Caves X Bare Bones
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48854d51427cc6d515fc3f609197565997190099.png)

**This is a Bare Bones port for users who wants to play Alex's Caves.**

- [all credits reserved for Alexander Mobiles](https://twitter.com/AlexModGuy)

**Alex's Caves is a big mod that adds cave biomes that are packed with content.**

![Abyssal Chasm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7b9f99c0f0a81ceb7df716a2ef962d5d86ac794.jpeg)
![Toxic Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bea1f277d234f4ed385dc9cd1bf9855876391fd.jpeg)[_render by Gous_](https://x.com/Gousisme)


## CREDITS:
- [Alexander Mobiles - Original/Mod Creator](https://twitter.com/AlexModGuy)
- [MystieFox - Resource Pack Creator](https://twitter.com/awaiiuu)
- [Gous - Bare Bones Render](https://x.com/Gousisme)
